title: [policy] Replay protection compliance
description: Policy: spec/02-physical-link.md §4.4. MUST: (1) Epoch advances on reboot, (2) Epoch init random [128,255] without persistence, (3) Receivers reject epoch < LastEpoch, (4) SeqNum window for out-of-order. When executing: grep for epoch/seqnum handling in all implementations, create compliance bead per code section.
close_reason: All implementations verified compliant with spec section 4.4 replay protection. Fixed 3 Rust violations: (1) link_layer.rs ReplayProtector now rejects epoch < LastEpoch with half-space wrap handling, (2) bridge.rs KissBridge defaults to epoch 128 with with_epoch() for spec-compliant init, (3) stack.rs Stack::new() now requires epoch param. All 58 tests pass.
